# Spot On Carpet & Tile Cleaning — AI Context

## Business
Spot On Carpet & Tile Cleaning is a Fresno, California-based residential and commercial cleaning company serving the greater Fresno area including Clovis, Madera, Selma, Sanger, Reedley, Kerman, Fowler, Tulare, and Visalia.

## Services
- Carpet cleaning (low-moisture, eco-safe, ~4 hour dry time)
- Tile and grout cleaning (ceramic, porcelain, stone)
- Upholstery cleaning (couches, chairs, sofas)
- Aggregate surface cleaning (driveways, patios, walkways)
- Pet stain and odor removal (complete extraction guaranteed)
- Commercial cleaning (flexible scheduling, volume pricing)

## Differentiators
- 5.0 stars on Yelp (28+ reviews)
- 80% less water than traditional steam cleaning
- Eco-friendly, biodegradable products — safe for pets and children
- Licensed and insured
- Next-day availability

## Contact
- Phone: (559) 721-4400
- Address: 5531 N Avocado Ln, Fresno, CA 93722
- Website: https://spotonfresno.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:30 AM–6:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM–1:00 PM

## Owner
Family-owned and operated. Community-focused. Fresno born.
